tasks.title: Add amenity/feature JOIN to accommodation model search
tasks.description:
REQ-096-01 (T-014 from SPEC-075).

Add JOIN clauses to `search()` and `searchWithRelations()` in `packages/db/src/models/accommodation/accommodation.model.ts` so that passing `amenities: string[]` and/or `features: string[]` filters applies an INNER JOIN on `r_accommodation_amenity` and `r_accommodation_feature` tables. Intersection semantics: accommodations must match ALL provided IDs. Maintain existing pagination, sorting, and soft-delete behavior.

Files:
- `packages/db/src/models/accommodation/accommodation.model.ts`

Tests (write first):
- `packages/db/test/models/accommodation/accommodation-amenity-filter.test.ts`
- Unit: search with 1 amenity, search with 2 amenities (intersection), search with feature filter, search with both amenity+feature, search with no filter (unchanged behavior).
- Expect SQL to use JOIN and return only matching rows.

subtasks.title: Add amenities JOIN to search query builder
Add features JOIN to search query builder
Write unit tests for filtered search

tasks.title: Update AccommodationSearchSchema to expose amenities/features params
tasks.description:
REQ-096-01 follow-through.

Update `packages/schemas/src/accommodation/search.ts` to declare `amenities` and `features` as optional `z.array(z.string().uuid())` in `AccommodationSearchHttpSchema` and `AccommodationSearchSchema`. Ensure coercion from repeated query params.

Files:
- `packages/schemas/src/accommodation/search.ts`

Tests:
- `packages/schemas/test/accommodation/search.schema.test.ts`
- Validate comma-separated or repeated query params parse correctly.
- Validate that malformed UUIDs are rejected.

subtasks.title: Add amenities/features fields to search schema
Write schema coercion tests

tasks.title: Implement parallel Promise.all queries with safeIlike in search endpoint [REQ-096-04 split 2/3]
tasks.description:
REQ-096-04 — Part 2b (query implementation).

In `apps/api/src/routes/search/public/search.ts`, replace the stub body with:
- `Promise.all` running 4 entity queries: accommodations, destinations, events, posts — each using `safeIlike()`, limited to `limit` (default 5).
- Map each result to `SearchResultItemSchema` shape.
- Apply rate limit: 30 req/min per IP.

Files:
- `apps/api/src/routes/search/public/search.ts`

Tests:
- GET /search?q=co returns 4 non-empty groups when seeded data exists.
- Each item has id, slug, type, coverImage fields.
- Verify safeIlike used (no raw ilike).

subtasks.title: Implement Promise.all across 4 entity queries
Apply safeIlike for all entity searches
Add rate-limit middleware (30 req/min)

tasks.title: Write integration tests for unified search endpoint [REQ-096-04 split 3/3]
tasks.description:
REQ-096-04 — Part 2c (tests).

Write full integration test suite in `apps/api/test/routes/search/public/search.test.ts`:
- GET /search?q=co returns 4 groups with correct structure.
- GET /search?q=x (1 char) returns 400.
- All items conform to SearchResultItemSchema.
- Rate limit: 31st request returns 429.
- safeIlike injection safety: q containing % or _ does not cause SQL errors.

Files:
- `apps/api/test/routes/search/public/search.test.ts` (NEW)

Blocks: T-046 (busqueda page depends on working search endpoint).
